instructions.instruction: Use for_each with a map or set for named resources; NEVER use count for resources that differ by configuration.
NEVER hardcode provider credentials or region in .tf files; use environment variables or IAM roles and var.region.
NEVER store Terraform state in a local backend for team or CI use; configure a remote backend with state locking.
Validate every generated configuration with the terraform-validator skill before presenting it as complete.
Add prevent_destroy lifecycle rules on stateful resources (KMS keys, RDS, S3 buckets with data).
Never hardcode sensitive values; declare them as variables and mark them sensitive.
